Soccer Predictions Engine
Pull this weekend's fixtures from Flashscore via RapidAPI. Select leagues and dates, hit Run — predictions populate the Home page and Soccer page automatically.
Fri/Sat/Sun for a full weekend card. Leave blank to use today.
What this does: Calls the Flashscore API for every fixture in selected leagues on selected dates. Pulls win/draw/away percentages, BTTS, Over 2.5 predictions, and H2H context. Writes everything to your market_trends table. Appears instantly on the Home page feed and Soccer → Market Trends tab.
Odds Sync
Fetches live odds from 40+ bookmakers via The Odds API. Calculates model vs market value gaps and writes them to your fixture cards. Run after the Soccer Engine to get value grades.
What Odds Sync adds to each fixture:
⚡ Best available odds across 40+ books · Best bookmaker per outcome
📊 Fair implied probabilities (margin removed) · Market margin %
🎯 Model edge = your prob minus market prob · EV% calculation
🏆 Value grade A/B/C shown on fixture cards · Best value market flagged
Leave blank for today. Set multiple dates by running sync once per date.
API Usage
Run sync to see usage
Push Notifications
Send instant alerts to all opted-in subscribers. Use for hot tips and bankers.
